info.title: ORI Runtime API
info.description: Complete public API surface for integrating ORI. Base URL: https://glm.thynaptic.com/v1

bearerAuth.description: Preferred ORI runtime key. Legacy glm.* keys remain valid until rotated.

surface.description: Originating surface: home, studio, api, etc.

args.description: Action arguments. Common keys: topic, prompt, url, content.

depends_on.description: Step IDs this step depends on. Dependency-free steps run in parallel.

id.description: Provide to update an existing entity.

task_id.description: Link this event to a task.

profile.description: Optional working style for the chosen surface. Only honored when the profile belongs to the surface set via X-Ori-Context.

get.description: Public. Real-time state and event streaming. Upgrades to WebSocket.

post.description: Protected by a shared internal registration_token, not a runtime key. Mints a product-scoped ORI runtime key (same one-key-anywhere format) for approved first-party apps (ORI Home, ORI Studio, ORI Mobile, ORI Dev). Not a public self-serve developer key flow.

200.description: Runtime key minted for the approved app

post.description: Public. Marketing → SMB sign-up.

get.description: Returns the list of public model IDs. Current public default: oricli-oracle.

post.description: Accepts an agb.* bootstrap key and mints a product-scoped ORI runtime key (ori.*, one key anywhere) for an approved first-party app. Bootstrap keys can only mint keys for apps they are explicitly authorized for via bootstrap:app:<normalized-app-name> scope. Bootstrap keys do not grant chat, spaces, email, or admin access on their own.

200.description: Minted GLM runtime key for the approved app

403.description: Bootstrap key lacks required scope for this app

post.description: Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint at https://glm.thynaptic.com/v1/mcp. Supports initialize, tools/list, and tools/call. Current public runtime tools include get_key_info, check_health, get_capabilities, list_surfaces, list_working_styles, and get_request_template. See /tools.json for the broader published schema catalog.
Main ORI chat endpoint. Requires runtime:chat scope. Use X-Ori-Context to select a surface. Use profile for working style. Responses include a meta block with provider and sass_factor.

parameters.name: X-Session-ID
parameters.description: Client-generated session ID for conversation history tracking.

403.description: Valid key lacks runtime:chat scope.

post.description: Submit roasts and lessons to improve future ORI personality consistency. Requires runtime:chat scope.

lesson.description: What ORI should learn from this.

post.description: Send outbound email through ORI's native runtime email layer. Requires runtime:email:send scope.
Analyze an image via Oracle (Codex). One of image_url, image_base64, or image_path is required.

save_memory.description: If true and MemoryBank is available, stores as a ProvenanceSeen fragment.

post.description: Feed text into ORI's memory and knowledge systems.

post.summary: Ingest a web URL into memory
post.description: Feed a web source into ORI's knowledge/memory systems.
Creates a permanent public share link for a canvas artifact.
Create an ORI agent from a natural language description.
Executes an agentic task in an isolated desktop workspace. Requires runtime:workspaces scope. Returns SSE stream.

Spawns an autonomous agent task with graduated autonomy and intent-aware routing. The agent classifies query complexity and selects the appropriate model tier, tool permissions, and effort level automatically. Delegation to a background cloud agent is supported — the response will include is_delegated and pr_link when triggered. Requires runtime:chat scope.
Triggers a deep research dive using read-only tools at high reasoning effort. Produces a comprehensive report with citations. No file mutations or side effects. Requires runtime:chat scope.
Intent-aware SearXNG lookup. Requires runtime:chat scope.
Fetches a URL and returns cleaned, RAG-ready context. Requires runtime:chat scope.
High-signal technical repository snapshot. Requires runtime:chat scope.

get.description: Check the sovereign browser runtime (browserd) availability.

post.summary: Open a URL in the browser session

get.description: Returns the list of tools available in the current context.

post.description: App-neutral MaterialToMasteryCompiler. Supply extracted user-owned material; ORI returns summary, concept graph, flashcards, drills, quizzes, mock assessments, misconception map, review cadence, mastery score, guided assistance mode, learning DAG, and cross-surface reinforcement hints. Use X-Ori-Context: learn for the reusable learning substrate.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Generate a Quest Scaffold for an improvement goal
post.description: App-neutral goal-to-operating-system transformer. Supply a vague improvement goal; ORI returns a named quest, adult role identity, first action, milestones, daily rhythm, workspace sections, progress model, review schedule, memory seeds, and Memory/Chronos/GoalDaemon/PAD integration hints. Product clients still own persistence, reminders, social accountability, and confirmed goal registration.

goal.example: I need to study better for my board exam

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.description: App-neutral Behavioral Reinforcement Substrate. Supply a routine, habit, todo, goal, or shared goal; ORI returns a temporal contract, surface-specific feedback model, initial state, recovery policy, and Memory/Chronos/GoalDaemon/PAD/CALI integration hints. Product clients own durable storage, reminders, widgets, sync, shared rooms, permissions, and reinforcement intensity.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Turn messy context into momentum packets
post.description: App-neutral Context-to-Momentum Engine. Supply notes, tasks, links, project fragments, user energy, and available time; ORI returns actionability buckets, future-self packets, next 5-minute and 30-minute moves, one preserved stepping stone, memory seeds, and Memory/Chronos/GoalDaemon integration hints. Product clients still own capture, storage, file movement, task creation, reminders, and confirmed archive/write actions.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Compile observed workflow into an SOP and skill candidate
post.description: App-neutral Procedure Compiler. Supply observations, transcript, tools, inputs, outputs, constraints, and outcome signal; ORI returns SOP, checklist, skill candidate, automation readiness, SCL TierSkills seed, and GoalDAG/Chronos/Forge integration hints. Product clients still own durable writes, skill registration, automation execution, permissions, approval gates, and external system changes.

outcome_signal.example: customer receives a correct next step

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Compile natural-language workflow intent into trigger/action grammar
post.description: App-neutral Workflow Grammar Compiler. Supply workflow intent, natural-language specification, trigger, conditions, action hints, available tools, approvals, constraints, and exceptions; ORI returns a trigger/action graph, variables, approval gates, failure modes, dry-run plan, readiness score, compiled expression, and Procedure/WorkGraph/Temporal/Forge/Memory integration hints. Product clients still own durable workflow registration, external writes, schedules, notifications, execution, credentials, permissions, and approval UX.

intent.example: turn inbound quote requests into reviewed follow-up drafts

specification.example: When a new quote email arrives then review the request then create a CRM task and draft a follow-up unless budget or date is missing.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Plan a governed external action route
post.description: App-neutral Sovereign Action Gateway planner. Supply intent, action hints, available providers, scopes, approval policy, risk tolerance, and memory policy; ORI returns ranked action candidates, recommended provider route, approval gate, policy labels, audit plan, dry-run instructions, memory plan, and WorkflowGrammar/WorkGraph/CALI/SCL/Chronos/Red integration hints. This endpoint does not execute external actions; product clients still own credentials, real execution, approval UX, durable action logs, notifications, schedules, and external mutations.

intent.example: send a follow-up email to a new quote lead

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Harvest useful context from a conversation
post.description: App-neutral Conversational Context Harvester. Supply meeting/chat transcripts, participant turns, intent, and context links; ORI returns decisions, commitments, unresolved threads, follow-up packets, memory seeds, and Memory/Chronos/GoalDAG/Procedure integration hints. Product clients still own note storage, memory writes, task creation, reminders, CRM/calendar updates, and confirmed persistence.

text.example: We decided the landing page ships Friday.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.description: App-neutral Temporal Coordination Engine. Supply tasks, available attention windows, fixed events, energy, dependencies, and preferences; ORI returns now/next/later buckets, schedule proposals, conflicts, memory seeds, and Chronos/GoalDAG/Memory automation hints. Product clients still own calendar writes, task mutations, reminders, notifications, conflict resolution, and confirmed commitment moves.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Prepare bounded context for an upcoming situation
post.description: App-neutral Ambient Anticipation layer. Supply upcoming situations, intent, participants, context signals, preferences, and recent outcomes; ORI returns readiness scoring, prep packets, missing context, suggested tone, safe next moves, memory seeds, and Memory/Chronos/Conversation/Temporal integration hints. Product clients still own email, calendar, CRM, memory, notification, task writes, and confirmed durable or external actions.

content.example: They want the annual plan before renewal.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Plan scoped codebase work from repo context
post.description: App-neutral Codebase-Resident Task Agent planner. Supply developer intent, repo area, file/symbol signals, constraints, known risks, and test commands; ORI returns scoped work packets, file ownership proposals, risk flags, verification steps, delegation hints, memory seeds, and Procedure/Temporal/Memory/Forge integration hints. Agent runtimes still own actual reads, edits, tests, commits, deployment, permissions, and protection of unrelated user changes.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.description: App-neutral Continuity Recovery Engine. Supply previous sessions, artifacts, decisions, commitments, open loops, intent, and project context; ORI returns a recovered thread, context packets, decision/commitment logs, open-loop state, suggested continuation, memory seeds, and Memory/Chronos/Conversation/Temporal/Procedure hints. Product clients still own durable memory writes, project snapshots, document/task updates, timelines, notifications, and source-of-truth storage.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Choose the next best execution move
post.description: App-neutral Intent-First Execution Orchestrator. Supply goal/intent, task state, blockers, dependencies, energy, available time, and recent signals; ORI returns a momentum score, next-best move, next options, blocked-because reasoning, dependency edges, memory seeds, and Continuity/Temporal/Procedure/Memory hints. Product clients still own issue/task mutations, project board writes, scheduling, assignment, notifications, and external execution.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Compile messy work context into typed WorkGraph state
post.description: WorkGraph v0. Supply messy operator context, notes, conversations, and work items; ORI returns typed work-state objects including jobs, tasks, decisions, owners, deadlines, blockers, approvals, notes, follow-ups, and metrics, plus graph edges, operator pulse, memory seeds, and Continuity/Execution/Conversation/Temporal/Procedure hints. Product clients still own durable graph storage, workspace UI, dashboards, permissions, notifications, task/document writes, and external mutations.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Answer operator questions over supplied WorkGraph state
post.description: Ambient Answers over supplied WorkGraph state. Ask questions like what is stuck, what was promised, what needs approval, who owns this, or what should be handled first; ORI returns findings, recommended moves, confidence, and Execution/Continuity/Memory hints. Answers use supplied graph state only and do not mutate workspaces.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Plan governed contextual action for an entity
post.description: Contextual Action Fabric. Supply an entity, objective, surface context, available tools, evidence, signals, and constraints; ORI returns an entity profile, evidence acquisition plan, fit/confidence score, governed action recommendations, reusable Skill Function candidate, memory seeds, and WorkGraph/Execution/Procedure/Memory/Temporal hints. Product clients still own provider calls, paid enrichment, CRM updates, outreach, budgets, audit logs, and approvals.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Detect timely opportunities from entity signals
post.description: Signal Opportunity layer. Supply entity-bound signals, context, objective, and optional timing windows; ORI returns ranked opportunities, a handle-first recommendation, watchlist candidates, memory seeds, and Contextual Action/Temporal/WorkGraph hints. Product clients still own durable watches, alerts, notifications, external monitoring, and execution approval.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Preserve intent and rationale across work changes
post.description: Intent Timeline. Supply work events, artifacts, decisions, constraints, outcomes, and open loops; ORI returns preserved intent moments, detected intent shifts, rationale trails, current-intent state, continuity packets, memory seeds, and Continuity/WorkGraph/Procedure/Memory/Temporal hints. Product clients still own durable memory, task/document updates, artifact writes, timelines, and source-of-truth storage.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Crystallize repeated workflows into procedure and skill candidates
post.description: Procedural Crystallizer. Supply repeated workflow runs, triggers, steps, tools, pain points, inputs, outputs, and outcome signals; ORI returns pattern readiness, a candidate procedure, skill candidate, automation readiness, next-observation plan, memory seeds, and Procedure/Skills/WorkGraph/Memory/Temporal/Forge hints. Product clients still own durable writes, skill registration, automation execution, schedules, notifications, approvals, and external mutations.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Build an ontology-free semantic memory graph
post.description: Semantic Memory Graph. Supply loose captures, notes, existing node hints, tags, people, objects, source handles, and retrieval questions; ORI returns ontology-free nodes, edges, soft clusters, recoverability scoring, retrieval moves, progressive-structure guidance, memory seeds, and Memory/WorkGraph/Continuity/Intent/Procedure hints. Product clients still own durable memory persistence, source storage, permissions, deletion policy, artifact/task updates, and external mutations.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Reason about scarce resources against explicit commitments
post.description: Commitment-Aware Resource Reasoner. Supply scarce resource pools, proposed actions, explicit commitments, hidden-obligation context, decision questions, and drift events; ORI returns resource reality, protected commitments, affected commitments, tradeoff options, least-disruptive repair, non-shaming permission language, memory seeds, and Memory/Chronos/WorkGraph/Temporal/Intent/Behavior hints. Product clients still own source-of-truth resource records, payment/bank/account sync, approvals, scheduling, notifications, and regulated financial/legal/tax/debt/investment decisions.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Apply a behavioral event and return reinforcement feedback
post.description: Applies completed, missed, deferred, or partially_completed events to supplied behavior state. Misses return recovery-first feedback rather than punishment.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Compute behavioral state from supplied events
post.description: Stateless state computation for a behavior and optional event list. Returns streak, stability score, completion/miss/defer counts, friction pattern, reinforcement tier, and next best action.

403.description: Valid key without required runtime scope

post.summary: Start an enterprise knowledge ingest job
post.description: Namespace-isolated RAG ingest for SMB tenants.

get.description: List named project containers for the authenticated tenant. Requires runtime:spaces scope.

post.description: Creates a new tenant-scoped project space. Requires runtime:spaces scope.

post.summary: Upload a document to a space
post.description: Requires runtime:spaces scope.

get.description: Surface-scoped session list. Requires runtime:chat scope.
Full message thread for a session. Requires runtime:chat scope.
Returns health status of active ORI background daemons.

post.description: Dispatch a batch of independent agent tasks in parallel. ORI executes each concurrently and collects results into a PAD session.

tasks.description: List of agent tasks to execute in parallel.

200.description: PAD session created with task results.

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient scope.

get.description: Returns all tick-controlled sovereign agent goals for the authenticated tenant.

post.description: Create a tick-controlled agent goal. Execution is paused between ticks — call POST /sovereign/goals/:id/tick to advance.

200.description: Sovereign goal state and step history.

post.description: Advance a tick-controlled sovereign goal by exactly one execution step. Returns the step result and updated goal state.

200.description: Step result and updated goal state.

post.description: Create a persistent task with optional inline steps. Tasks are tenant-scoped and persist across sessions.

get.description: List tasks for the authenticated tenant. Supports filtering by status, surface, and session_id.
Fetch a task by ID including all steps.

patch.description: Patch title, description, status, priority, or surface.

delete.description: Delete a task and all its steps (cascade).

post.summary: Add a step to a task
post.description: Append a new step to an existing task.

patch.description: Update a step's status and result.

post.description: Run the task's step DAG. Set Accept: text/event-stream for SSE streaming of step updates. Each SSE event carries step_id, status, and an optional snippet. Final event carries done: true and the full task object.

get.description: Returns the current task state without triggering execution.

post.description: Create or update a named real-world entity (person, vendor, business, etc.). Used to build the relational context graph for Deep Context retrieval.

get.description: List entities for the tenant. Use search= for name/alias substring match, kind= to filter by type.
Returns the entity and its full timestamped event history — the basis for Ghost-Logistics and Deep Context recall.

post.description: Append a timestamped event (message, invoice, booking, call, note) to an entity's history. These accumulate to power relational recall.
